creator: anonymous.bug.report@gmail.com
text:
I just updated p11-kit and it now depends on glib but it doesn't seem to be used?


# pkg info -d p11-kit
p11-kit-0.23.21:
        bash-completion-2.11,2
        libtasn1-4.16.0
        ca_root_nss-3.58
        libffi-3.3_1
        glib-2.66.0_1,1
        gettext-runtime-0.21
